symptom: Pricing total renders as 'NaN' when a coupon with a null discount is applied at checkout.
rootCause: computeTotal subtracts discount without null-check; null minus number yields NaN, which is then rendered directly.
userImpact: Checkout total displays as 'NaN' for ~3% of carts using legacy coupons; users abandon at the payment step.
recommendedPrevention: Validate discount as number at computeTotal boundary; add unit test for null-discount path.

preventionArtifacts.description: Asserts that computeTotal returns the unmodified subtotal when discount is null.
Rejects null discount at the API boundary so it cannot reach computeTotal.
